text.tspan: Metaphysics investigates the conditions that make experience possible.
Science operates as a restricted abstraction of that experience,
enabling precision while excluding its first-person, qualitative value.
Its validity depends on reintegration into the Life-World with awareness of these limits.
Priority depends on purpose and domain,
but all results remain anchored in the Life-World.
control, and formal modeling. Experience is authoritative in meaning,
Scientific models can revise interpretation of experience,
but cannot invalidate the fact of experience itself.
